Module 3: Seed Launch, Part 4
!
Executive Summary
Now that you’ve learned the basics of the Seed Launch, we’re going to talk
about a variation of this I call the “Hyper” Seed Launch. This is a very
powerful strategy, and can be used to create a business by itself.
It’s not easy, but has lots of potential to create a big business. A warning
though: this can be abused and should be used ethically - stay away from
unnecessary shenanigans.
To pull off the Hyper Seed Launch you do need to be able to talk to people
and make deals. This strategy is all about leveraging experts, but don’t
worry, it is generally easy to get an expert lined up for an interview.
The simplest niche to find experts in is book authors - they want more
exposure and more books sold. Most authors are desperate for promotion,
so they’ll be open-minded.
Do a search on Amazon for your topic/niche and see what books and
authors you find. Look up the author’s contact information and email them,
most will be happy to be interviewed.
Most experts in most markets aren’t making much money at all. All experts
want to sell more products, and in many cases they may not even have a
product.
!

Two ways to do this
#1: “Product Buildout”
• 	Interview the experts and record it - you can ask the same series of
questions to each expert
• 	Get it transcribed
• 	Give them a copy of the interview
• 	Package the series of interviews into a product
• 	Do a product launch and ask experts to promote launch as an affiliate -
when they promote your launch it builds your list
!
